name: io.github.webpeel/webpeel
title: WebPeel
description: Web data API that just works. Pass any URL, get clean markdown — Cloudflare, JavaScript, CAPTCHAs handled automatically. 97.6% success rate across 500+ domains. 55+ built-in extractors for Amazon, Reddit, YouTube, Wikipedia, LinkedIn. 65-98% token savings. Zero config.

environmentVariables.name: WEBPEEL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits. Get a free key at https://app.webpeel.dev/signup

tools.name: webpeel
tools.description: Fetch any URL and return clean, AI-ready markdown. Auto-handles JS rendering, Cloudflare bypass, and anti-bot protection. 55+ domain extractors for structured data from Amazon, Reddit, YouTube, Wikipedia, and more.

tools.name: webpeel_read
tools.description: Reader mode — extract just the article content from any URL, stripping navigation, ads, and boilerplate. 65-98% token savings vs raw HTML.

tools.name: webpeel_see
tools.description: Take screenshots of any URL with device emulation (mobile, tablet, desktop). Full-page capture, visual diff comparison, and design analysis.

tools.name: webpeel_find
tools.description: Search the web, discover sitemaps, or crawl entire sites. Smart search with AI summaries for restaurants, products, flights, hotels. Returns structured results.

tools.name: webpeel_extract
tools.description: Extract structured JSON from any page using built-in schemas (product, article, recipe, job, event) or custom JSON schemas. No LLM required for built-in schemas.

tools.name: webpeel_monitor
tools.description: Track any web page for content changes. Returns diffs when content updates. Use CSS selectors to monitor specific sections (prices, availability, etc.).

tools.name: webpeel_act
tools.description: Interact with web pages — click buttons, fill forms, scroll, wait for elements, execute JavaScript. Use for login flows, dynamic content loading, and multi-step extraction.
